summary: Disk Analysis gains a History tab with scan snapshots and per-drive scheduled fast/deep scans, plus a clearer startup splash and toolbar update label.
introduced: Scan History — new Disk Analysis tab records fast and deep scans with major category usage, top folders, duration, and indexed size per drive
Scheduled scans — enable weekday fast scans (6 AM) and weekly deep scans (Sunday 2 AM) per drive, with Enable recommended schedule and Run now actions
changed: Startup splash — Setting up DiskWise uses the animated scanning icon instead of a generic spinner while setup steps run
Update button — toolbar control label shortened to Update (help tooltip unchanged)
